title: E2E: mainnet endpoints respond + /pay shows fee
description:
What: End-to-end verification that (1) all DEFAULT_MAINNET_ENDPOINTS respond to a GetLatestBlock RPC, and (2) the /pay command outputs a fee estimate line.

Algorithm:
1. Write an integration test (gated behind MAINNET_ENABLED=1 env var) that:
   a. Calls connect_with_failover(DEFAULT_MAINNET_ENDPOINTS) and asserts it succeeds
   b. Calls client.latest_height() and asserts height > 0 and height < 3_000_000 (sanity bounds)
2. Write a unit test for the /pay fee display:
   a. Call the fee computation directly: zip317_fee(sapling_logical_actions(1, 2))
   b. Assert == 10_000 zatoshi
3. Ensure all tests in nie-060.1 (endpoints), nie-060.2 (fee display), nie-060.3 (round-robin) pass

Defensive programming rules:
- Mainnet connectivity test MUST be gated behind MAINNET_ENABLED=1 (not in CI by default — costs money to run)
- Height bounds (> 0, < 3_000_000) guard against empty responses without hardcoding current height
- Never log key material in this test (no wallets involved)

Agent team: V only (Validator — run all tests, report pass/fail)
acceptance_criteria: cargo test --workspace passes; MAINNET_ENABLED=1 cargo test mainnet_ passes with real endpoints; fee calculation test produces 10000 zatoshi for 1-in 2-out
